description_long: This street light features a tall, slender vertical pole with a circular base for stability. At the top, a single ornate horizontal arm extends outward, adorned with decorative scrollwork, supporting a hanging lantern-style lamp head. The lamp head is hexagonal with a pointed top and clear panels, reminiscent of classic Victorian or old-town street lighting. The entire structure appears to be made of metal, likely cast iron or steel, painted in a matte black finish. The design is both functional and decorative, suitable for urban parks, sidewalks, or historic districts. The lamp is intended to provide downward illumination while adding an element of traditional charm to its surroundings.
description: A tall, black metal street light with an ornate scrollwork arm supporting a hanging lantern-style lamp head. The design is classic and decorative, ideal for urban or historic settings.
description_view_0: The side view highlights the ornate scrollwork arm and the hanging lantern-style lamp head, showing the full profile of the lamp and its decorative features.
description_view_1: The front view presents the street light as a narrow silhouette, with the lantern head partially obscured behind the pole, emphasizing the vertical alignment.
description_view_2: The opposite side view mirrors the first, again showcasing the scrollwork arm and lantern, but from the reverse direction.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the pole and the back of the lantern head, with the scrollwork arm visible but less prominent.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Lantern-style, hexagonal with a pointed top, clear glass panels, and classic decorative elements reminiscent of Victorian street lamps.
attribute_pole_ornamentation: Scrollwork at the top arm; otherwise plain.
